approaches.title: Prefix-Suffix Balance Counting
approaches.summary: Compute prefix and suffix counts of target elements, then check subarray majority via balance adjustment.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using prefix and suffix arrays to compute target counts in subarrays.

approaches.title: Nested Loop with Running Balance
approaches.summary: Iterate over all subarrays using nested loops and maintain a running balance to count majority subarrays.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized to use a single running balance per starting index instead of prefix/suffix arrays.
